title: Real Homies Modpack
description: A modpack, made with love, for the real homies.
body:
A modpack, made with love, for the real homies.

A "mostly vanilla" modpack. Most mods are quality-of-life(QoL) mods such a shaders, minimap, enchantment improvements, immersive portals, trading boxes, inventory sorting, waypoint beacons for teleporting, many client and server optimizations and other minor gameplay tweaks.

**Performance Adjustments**

You may experience poor performance around nether portals from the Immersive Portals mod when using certain shaders such as:
- Complementary Shaders

Shaders that do not affect performance
- BSL
